place.name: Manipal Hospitals
place.address: 98, HAL Old Airport Rd, Kodihalli, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560017

foreign.name: Mom Trade Center
foreign.text: Hospital service are very nice , staffs are also cooperative , especially Prasenjit and Monami helped us a lot for our medical journey. But for Bangladeshi like us it's a bit expensive in terms of the treatment charges. If it's a little lesser than the present then it would be really helpful for us. Overall experience was excellent.

foreign.name: Girma Solomon
foreign.text:
We were at Manipal for a long period as international patients, and I want to specifically mention Lahari from the MIPC (International Patient Relations) team.
From the beginning, Lahari became our main point of contact and the person we … More

foreign.name: Hussain Irufan
foreign.text: Had a great experience at Manipal Hospital Bangalore.Old Airport Road. Special thanks to Shadhiya E at the International Patient Desk she is always helpful, kind, and professional. Her warm smile brings real comfort, and she supports patients with genuine care as if it’s her own responsibility. Truly appreciated! ♥️

foreign.name: Nazmul Hasan Emon
foreign.text: I am an international patient from Bangladesh who came to Manipal Hospital for my mother’s treatment. From the very beginning, I was impressed with the top-notch services here. The doctors, nurses, and support staff were all highly … More
